idea-plugin.name: DBF Reader
idea-plugin.description:
View and edit dBASE/xBase .dbf files as a table inside the IDE — instead of raw binary.
  • Table editor — records as rows, fields as columns, with a row-number gutter and a status bar (record count, DBF format variant, active encoding).
  • Cell editing for the C, N, F, L and D field types with type-aware editors: a checkbox for logical columns, a calendar picker for dates. Memo and extended types are shown read-only.
  • Find in table (the IDE Find shortcut) — highlights all matches with an "N of M" counter; Match Case, Whole Words, Regex and an optional row filter.
  • Go to Column (the File Structure shortcut) — a speed-search popup to jump to a field.
  • Copy as TSV — copies the selected cells to the clipboard as displayed.
  • Row and column operations — add/delete records; add, delete or edit a column's name, data type and size, with best-effort conversion of existing values.
  • Encoding handling — auto-detected from the DBF language-driver byte, with a manual override combo box and a configurable default (Settings | Tools | DBF Reader).
  • Safe saving — detects external changes on disk and offers to overwrite or reload; optional one-time .bak backup before the first overwrite.
Licensed under the MIT License. Bundles third-party libraries under their own licenses; the full license texts and attribution ship in the plugin distribution.
